query_normalized: from chatbot to digital colleague: the paradigm shift toward persistent autonomous ai computer science
rationale: This paper studies autonomous software agents (criterion b - independent variable on the same domain), which is a core component of the user's question about persistent autonomous AI, even though it focuses specifically on value system learning rather than the full chatbot-to-colleague paradigm shift. For a literature review, this would be a valid citation when discussing the technical foundations of autonomous AI agents and their alignment with human values.
